verses.text: Nungak laka hoihpen nu aw, na ngaihno, koi-ah pai hiam? Na ngaihno koi lam pai hiam? Amah hong zon'pih nung.
Ka ngaihno, paknamtui kung a pona, a huan sungah pai hi. A huan sungah a tuu cing a, unok pakte a lo hi
Ka ngaihno kei-a' hi a, kei zong ama-a' hi'ng. Amah in unok pak lakah a tuute gamtasak hi.
Ngaihno aw, Jerusalem khuapi bangin na etlawm mahmah a, Tirzah khuapi bangin na hoih mahmah a, vantung aksi bangin na deihhuai hi
Keima lam hong nga kei in. Na mai in hong leng lua hi. Gilead mual tunga keelhon diang leklek bangin na samphekte phe velvel hi
Na hate zong, a kisil khin phet tuuhon bangin pak singseng hi. A tok khat zong omlo a, a vekpi-in kituak dimdiam hi
Na lu khuhna puan sung panin na kho hong san lihleh hi
Kumpi-zi sawmguk, kumpi zineu sawmgiat, simzawh lohin nungak tampi om khading a
ahi zongin khat bek ka ngai a, amah pen vahui bangin it-huai hi. Amah pen a nu' tanu neihsun hi a, a nu' ta it pen khat ahi hi
Zing khuavak tawh a kibang hih nungak kua ahi hiam? Amah melhoih mahmah a, nitaang, khataang, a bang hi
Kuam sunga om singkungnote a en ding, leengguite a pak nai hiam a en ding, mang kawlsing a pak nai hiam a en dingin singno huanah ka paisuk hi
Galdo dingin a kipan sakol hawlpa a lin' bangin nang kong ngaihna hangin ka lingling hi.
Hong ciahkik in, hong ciahkik in, Shulam numei aw. Nang kong muh theihna dingun hong ciahkik in, hong ciahkik in.
